whenToUse.summary: Acquire a NEW buyer at zero net cost on cold traffic by leading with an irresistibly cheap or free front-end (physical product, sample, or low-cost info product) where the customer pays only shipping. The 2-step order form captures the lead on step 1 (abandoned-cart recovery) before billing on step 2. All OTO/downsell revenue is pure profit.
goals: Convert cold/paid traffic into first-time buyers cheaply
Build a buyer list (not just a lead list)
Acquire customers at break-even or better via order bump + OTOs
Liquidate ad spend so backend revenue is profit
signals: Client has a cheap/physical front-end product or sample to give away
Goal stated as 'get customers' or 'self-liquidate ad spend', not 'collect leads'
Cold paid traffic is the intended source
There is a clear backend value ladder to upsell into
antiSignals: Front-end price is $27-$97 with margin goals -> route to Self-Liquidating Offer (SLO) Funnel
The free item is a book at just-pay-shipping -> route to Book Funnel
No payment is collected at all (email only) -> route to a Lead/Squeeze Funnel
Recurring subscription is the core offer -> route to Membership/Continuity Funnel

pageStructure.purpose: Sell the irresistible free/cheap front-end and capture the buyer. Step 1 collects name + shipping address (creates an abandoned-cart lead even if they bail); Step 2 reveals billing + the order bump.
keyElements: Product hero shot / unboxing image or short sales video (5-Minute Perfect Webinar)
What's-included value stack with stacked dollar value vs. 'you pay only shipping'
Step 2: payment fields + ORDER BUMP checkbox with its own mini-sales copy
Social proof: testimonials, ratings, recognizable logos
widgets: Skill 44: Two-Step Order Form (contact step -> payment step)
Skill 44: Order Bump element on payment step

pageStructure.purpose: Immediately after purchase, present a higher-value complementary product as a one-click add-on (card already on file) to raise average order value.
keyElements: 'Wait — your order is not complete' interrupt headline
Upsell VSL or short sales copy for the complementary product
One-click 'Yes, add this to my order' button
Plain 'No thanks' decline link beneath the button

pageStructure.purpose: Offer a second upsell, or downsell OTO 1 (payment plan or 'lite' version) to recover buyers who declined.
keyElements: Second upsell offer OR downsell of OTO 1 (lower price / payment plan)

pageStructure.purpose: Confirm the order, deliver/ship details, hand off any digital bonus, and bridge the new buyer to the next rung of the value ladder.
keyElements: Shipping/delivery expectation + digital bonus access (if any)
Next-step CTA into the backend offer (value ladder bridge)
widgets: Optional Skill 44: Calendar widget if backend is a call

primaryPersona.script: Tripwire recipe — required-element placement, order-bump + OTO/downsell rules
primaryPersona.role: Governs funnel TYPE selection and exact page-element checklist

salesVideoScript.script: 5-Minute Perfect Webinar (origin story + one secret + close)
salesVideoScript.why: Brunson prescribes the 5-minute Perfect Webinar as the sales video on unboxing/tripwire pages for products under $100 (library #34).

supportingPersonas.script: Fill-in-the-blank headline + benefit-stack formulas; order-bump and OTO microcopy; P.S. close
supportingPersonas.role: Writes the page headline, value stack, bump copy, and upsell copy

supportingPersonas.script: Hook / Story / Offer (hook + story + unique mechanism + offer + follow-up)
supportingPersonas.role: Frames the front-end hook and the unique-mechanism angle

supportingPersonas.script: Attractive Character + Value Ladder + value-stack framing
supportingPersonas.role: Bonds the buyer and positions the front-end as rung one of the ladder

copyFramework.notes: Copywriting Secrets writes the words; Funnel Hacker's Cookbook governs the structure and element placement; the sales video is a 5-Minute Perfect Webinar. Keep it short, punchy, impulse-driven — this is a low-friction front end, not a long pitch.

skill6Steps: Create Funnel -> name with client prefix (e.g. ZHC) -> Create
Add New Step 1 = '2-Step Order Form Page' -> build (custom HTML in code block, or Vercel-built page pulled in via embed if heavy)
skill44Widgets: Two-Step Order Form (contact step then payment step) on Step 1
Order Bump element on the payment step
One-Click Upsell elements on Steps 2 and 3
Tags + purchase-trigger workflow for follow-up sequence
products: OTO 1, OTO 2/downsell products in GHL Payments
ghlBuild.notes: Build forms/tags/products in advance via Skill 44 (or GHL community/official MCP/API), then embed into Skill 6 pages. Pages built either as naked GHL-compatible HTML in the code-block element or in Vercel and pulled in via embed link when the page has heavy features. Order math: front-end shipping + bump + OTOs calibrated to break even on cold ad spend.
